---

### 🧑‍💻 About Me

Hey guys! I'm **Dark2932**, an 18-year-old Chinese boy currently studying at [**Nanjing XiaoZhuang University**](https://www.njxzc.edu.cn/).  

I come from Zhumadian, a small city in southern Henan Province with a lively, down‑to‑earth atmosphere.

I'm not just a **Minecraft** player – I'm a modder and tweaker who loves expanding and reshaping the blocky world with code.  

Also, I'm majoring in **Automation**, so I'm pretty into electronics as well.

- 🎮 **Focus**: Minecraft mod & modpack development  
- ☕ **Main languages**: Java  
- 🔧 **Also using**: **JavaScript (KubeJS)** for gameplay tweaks

---
